typography.font_pairing_rationale: Cormorant Garamond provides the 'Royal Heritage' editorial luxury feel, while Outfit delivers the 'Apple-level smoothness' and futuristic legibility.

hierarchy.h1: text-5xl sm:text-6xl lg:text-7xl font-light tracking-tighter leading-none

spacing_and_layout.philosophy: Generous Spacing Philosophy with tension and asymmetry. Every section must feel expensive and uncrowded.

motion_and_effects.glassmorphism: Heavy blur (backdrop-blur-2xl) with very low opacity backgrounds (bg-black/40) and 1px delicate inner stroke (border-white/10). Add backdrop-saturate-150 for vivid spice colors underneath.
motion_and_effects.shadows: Soft ambient glowing shadows using spice accent colors instead of pure white/black (e.g., shadow-[0_0_40px_rgba(229,57,53,0.15)] for chili).
motion_and_effects.animations: Liquid animations for hover states. Slow, buttery smooth transitions (duration-500 or duration-700 ease-out). Staggered fade-ins for text.
motion_and_effects.particles: Floating spice dust particles (turmeric, chili, coriander) in hero and interactive sections. Use subtle movement.

hero.layout: Cinematic full-screen (100vh) with massive centered 3D spice packet. Text overlay with luxury gold accents.
hero.effects: Hyper-realistic lighting, dynamic reflections, floating spice particles, deep matte black background fading into royal red at the bottom.

product_cards.layout: Glassmorphism cards (bg-black/30 backdrop-blur-xl border-white/10). Floating effect.
product_cards.interaction: On hover, card lifts gently, inner glow intensifies in the color of the spice (yellow/red/green), image rotates slightly.

storytelling_section.layout: Asymmetric bento grid. Mixing high-res heritage imagery with dark UI elements.
storytelling_section.typography: Large editorial serif headings, overlapping images.

buttons.primary: bg-gradient-to-r from-[#BF953F] via-[#FCF6BA] to-[#AA771C] text-black font-medium tracking-widest uppercase text-sm py-4 px-8 rounded-none hover:shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(212,175,55,0.4)] transition-all
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border border-white/20 text-white font-medium tracking-widest uppercase text-sm py-4 px-8 rounded-none hover:bg-white/10 transition-all

navigation.style: Sticky header with Crystal Glass effect (bg-black/60 backdrop-blur-2xl border-b border-white/10). Elegant, spaced-out links.

hero_backgrounds.description: Explosive abstract art with vibrant orange and gold textures on a dark background. (Use for spice explosion background)
Smoked ground paprika and turmeric mixed together on black surface. (Use for storytelling or background textures)

products.description: Vibrant red chili powder with a whole red chili pepper on a dark background.
Detailed view of coriander seeds in a wooden spoon, emphasizing texture.

storytelling.description: Detailed arches of the historic Kumbhalgarh Fort in Rajasthan, India. (Use for Royal Heritage About Section)

instructions_to_main_agent: Install required dependencies: framer-motion, lucide-react, react-three-fiber, @tsparticles/react, @tsparticles/slim.
Configure Tailwind with the specified color palette and font families (Cormorant Garamond, Outfit).

For the 3D rotating spice packet, use react-three-fiber if possible, or simulate it using a high-quality product image with framer-motion (useTransform mapped to mouse coordinates for a 3D tilt effect).
Implement tsParticles for the floating spice particles in the hero section.
Ensure the Admin panel follows the dark luxury theme but remains highly functional and data-dense (Archetype 4 principles mixed with Archetype 5).
DO NOT use generic card designs. Use glassmorphism exclusively for cards and prominent surfaces to maintain the Apple/Tesla premium feel.
Strictly follow the typography hierarchy: H1 must be huge, thin, and elegant. Overlines must be tracked out and uppercase.
Include data-testid on all buttons and interactive elements for testing.
